info.name: KWIKAPI v3.0.1
info.description:
KwikAPI API Documentations

Version v3.0.1, Date: 20th December 2025 by Yoflic India Pvt Ltd

---

Base URLs:

🫆UAT/Mock APIs URL: [https://uat.kwikapi.com](https://uat.kwikapi.com)

🌐 Production APIs URL: [https://www.kwikapi.com](https://www.kwikapi.com)

---

📋 Requested API Rate Limits

**| # | API Name | Deafult Limit |**  
**| 1 |** Service Category List | `10 / day` |  
**| 2 |** Biller List API | `20 / day` |  
**| 3 |** Biller Details API | `20 / day` |  
**| 4 |** Circle Codes API | `2 / day` |  
**| 5 |** Transaction Status Fetch API | `100 / day` |  
**| 6 |** Last 100 Transactions Fetch API | `48 / day` |  
**| 7 |** Wallet Balance Fetch API | `48 / day` |  
**| 8 |** Commission Fetch API | `2 / day` |

_These are deafult limits, Balance check and Status Check limits can be increase as per account performance and use case, It is subject to approval._

---

request.description: This API provides the complete active list of all service\`s categories.

response.name: SUCCESS
RATE_LIMITED Error

- This is allowed for syncing purposes only.
